2604.06169.title: In-Place Test-Time Training
2604.06169.paper_summary: The static ``train then deploy" paradigm fundamentally limits Large Language Models (LLMs) from dynamically adapting their weights in response to continuous streams of new information inherent in real-world tasks. Test-Time Training (TTT) offers a compelling alternative by updating a subset of model parameters (fast weights) at inference time, yet its potential in the current LLM ecosystem is hindered by critical barriers including architectural incompatibility, computational inefficiency and misaligned fast weight objectives for language modeling. In this work, we introduce In-Place Test-Time Training (In-Place TTT), a framework that seamlessly endows LLMs with Test-Time Training ability. In-Place TTT treats the final projection matrix of the ubiquitous MLP blocks as its adaptable fast weights, enabling a ``drop-in" enhancement for LLMs without costly retraining from scratch. Furthermore, we replace TTT's generic reconstruction objective with a tailored, theoretically-grounded objective explicitly aligned with the Next-Token-Prediction task governing autoregressive language modeling. This principled objective, combined with an efficient chunk-wise update mechanism, results in a highly scalable algorithm compatible with context parallelism. Extensive experiments validate our framework's effectiveness: as an in-place enhancement, it enables a 4B-parameter model to achieve superior performance on tasks with contexts up to 128k, and when pretrained from scratch, it consistently outperforms competitive TTT-related approaches. Ablation study results further provide deeper insights on our design choices. Collectively, our results establish In-Place TTT as a promising step towards a paradigm of continual learning in LLMs.
2604.06169.paper_summary_zh: 靜態的「訓練然後部署」範式從根本上限制了大型語言模型（LLMs）在面對現實任務中持續流入的新資訊時，無法動態調整其權重。測試時訓練（TTT）提供了一個引人注目的替代方案，通過在推理時更新模型參數的子集（快速權重），然而在當前的LLM生態系統中，其潛力受到關鍵障礙的阻礙，包括架構不兼容、計算效率低下以及與語言建模不一致的快速權重目標。在這項工作中，我們介紹了就地測試時訓練（In-Place TTT），這是一個無縫賦予LLMs測試時訓練能力的框架。就地TTT將普遍存在的MLP塊的最終投影矩陣視為其可調整的快速權重，使LLMs能夠進行「即插即用」的增強，而無需從頭開始昂貴的再訓練。此外，我們將TTT的一般重建目標替換為一個量身定制的、理論基礎的目標，該目標與支配自回歸語言建模的下一個標記預測任務明確對齊。這一原則性目標，結合高效的分塊更新機制，產生了一種高度可擴展的算法，與上下文並行性兼容。大量實驗驗證了我們框架的有效性：作為一種就地增強，它使一個擁有40億參數的模型在上下文長度達到128k的任務上實現了卓越的性能，並且當從頭開始進行預訓練時，始終超越競爭性的TTT相關方法。消融研究結果進一步提供了對我們設計選擇的深入見解。總體而言，我們的結果確立了就地TTT作為LLMs持續學習範式的一個有前景的步驟。
2604.06169.author: Guhao Feng et.al.
2604.06169.authors: Guhao Feng, Shengjie Luo, Kai Hua, Ge Zhang, Di He, Wenhao Huang, Tianle Cai
